<!-- source: https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list -->

# Query compliance activities
GET/v1/compliance/activities
List compliance activities for the authenticated tenant.
The tenant is the caller's parent organization, or — for an organization with no parent — the organization itself. Returns a paginated list of compliance activities that can be filtered by various criteria.
##### Query ParametersExpand Collapse 
activity_types: optional array of "abuse_decision_received" or "account_deleted" or "admin_api_key_created" or 326 more
Filter activities by type. See the response `data` schema for the additional fields each type returns. Cannot be combined with `exclude_activity_types[]`.
"abuse_decision_received"
An external anti-abuse service reported a consequential decision about a sign-in or sign-up attempt.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.activity_types.items%5B0%5D)
"account_deleted"
User-initiated self-service account deletion.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.activity_types.items%5B1%5D)
"admin_api_key_created"
An admin API key was created.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.activity_types.items%5B2%5D)
"admin_api_key_deleted"

Admin assigned an RBAC custom role to a principal.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.activity_types.items%5B278%5D)
"rbac_role_created"
Admin created an RBAC custom role.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.activity_types.items%5B279%5D)
"rbac_role_deleted"
Admin deleted an RBAC custom role.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.activity_types.items%5B280%5D)
"rbac_role_permission_added"
Admin added a permission to an RBAC custom role.
Emitted once per requested permission, including permissions the role already had, so a retried request still produces a complete audit record.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.activity_types.items%5B281%5D)
"rbac_role_permission_removed"
Admin removed a permission from an RBAC custom role.
Emitted once per requested permission, including permissions the role already lacked, so a retried request still produces a complete audit record.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.activity_types.items%5B282%5D)
"rbac_role_unassigned"
Admin unassigned an RBAC custom role from a principal.

"rbac_role_updated"
Admin updated an RBAC custom role.

"tunnel_archived"
An MCP tunnel was archived.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.activity_types.items%5B313%5D)
"tunnel_certificate_added"
An inner-TLS CA certificate was added to a tunnel.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.activity_types.items%5B314%5D)
"tunnel_certificate_revoked"
An inner-TLS CA certificate was revoked from a tunnel.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.activity_types.items%5B315%5D)
"tunnel_created"
An MCP tunnel was created.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.activity_types.items%5B316%5D)
"tunnel_token_minted"
An OAuth bearer token for the tunnel management API was minted.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.activity_types.items%5B317%5D)
"tunnel_token_revealed"
The Cloudflare connector secret for a tunnel was revealed to the caller.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.activity_types.items%5B318%5D)
"tunnel_token_revoked"
An OAuth bearer token for the tunnel management API was revoked.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.activity_types.items%5B319%5D)
"tunnel_token_rotated"
The Cloudflare connector secret for a tunnel was rotated.
`tunnel_token_id` is the id of the _newly-issued_ token. The previous token is invalidated by the rotation and its id is not recorded here.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.activity_types.items%5B320%5D)
"user_consent_recorded"
User granted a consent for a specific entity (e.g. consumer health consent for an MCP server).
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.activity_types.items%5B321%5D)
"user_consent_revoked"
User revoked a previously granted consent for a specific entity.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.activity_types.items%5B322%5D)
"user_logged_out"
A user signed out of one or all sessions.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.activity_types.items%5B323%5D)
"workspace_member_spend_limit_created"
A per-member or workspace-default Claude Code spend limit was created.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.activity_types.items%5B324%5D)
"workspace_member_spend_limit_deleted"
A per-member or workspace-default Claude Code spend limit was deleted.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.activity_types.items%5B325%5D)
"workspace_member_spend_limit_updated"
A per-member Claude Code spend limit amount was updated.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.activity_types.items%5B326%5D)
"workspace_spend_limit_created"
A workspace-level API spend limit was created.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.activity_types.items%5B327%5D)
"workspace_spend_limit_deleted"
A workspace-level API spend limit was deleted.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.activity_types.items%5B328%5D)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.activity_types)
actor_ids: optional array of string
Filter activities by actor IDs (currently only `user_...` IDs are supported). Enumerate IDs via `GET /v1/compliance/organizations/{org_uuid}/users`.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.actor_ids)
after_id: optional string
Pagination cursor for retrieving the next page of results. To paginate, pass the `last_id` value from the most recent response. Clients should treat this value as an opaque string and not attempt to parse or interpret its contents, as the format may change without notice.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.after_id)
before_id: optional string
Pagination cursor for retrieving the previous page of results. To paginate, pass the `first_id` value from the most recent response. Clients should treat this value as an opaque string and not attempt to parse or interpret its contents, as the format may change without notice.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.before_id)
created_at: optional object { gt, gte, lt, lte } 
gt: optional string
Filter activities created after this time (RFC 3339 format)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.created_at.gt)
gte: optional string
Filter activities created at or after this time (RFC 3339 format)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.created_at.gte)
lt: optional string
Filter activities created before this time (RFC 3339 format)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.created_at.lt)
lte: optional string
Filter activities created at or before this time (RFC 3339 format)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.created_at.lte)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.created_at)
exclude_activity_types: optional array of "abuse_decision_received" or "account_deleted" or "admin_api_key_created" or 326 more
Exclude activities of these types. Cannot be combined with `activity_types[]`.
"abuse_decision_received"
An external anti-abuse service reported a consequential decision about a sign-in or sign-up attempt.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.exclude_activity_types.items%5B0%5D)
"account_deleted"
User-initiated self-service account deletion.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.exclude_activity_types.items%5B1%5D)
"admin_api_key_created"
An admin API key was created.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.exclude_activity_types.items%5B2%5D)
"admin_api_key_deleted"
An admin API key was deleted.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.exclude_activity_types.items%5B3%5D)
"admin_api_key_updated"
An admin API key was updated (renamed or activated/deactivated).
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.exclude_activity_types.items%5B4%5D)
"admin_connector_request_resolved"
Admin approved or dismissed pending member requests to enable an MCP connector.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.exclude_activity_types.items%5B5%5D)
"admin_request_created"
Admin request created by an org member (seat upgrade, limit increase, join org, end-user invite).
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.exclude_activity_types.items%5B6%5D)
"age_verified"
User age was verified.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.exclude_activity_types.items%5B7%5D)
"anonymous_mobile_login_attempted"
Anonymous mobile login was attempted.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.exclude_activity_types.items%5B8%5D)
"api_key_created"
Activity logged when a new API key is created.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.exclude_activity_types.items%5B9%5D)
"audit_log_export_accessed"

[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.exclude_activity_types)
limit: optional number
Maximum results (default: 100, max: 5000)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.limit)
order: optional "asc" or "desc"
Sort direction by `created_at`. `desc` (default) returns newest-first; `asc` returns oldest-first for incremental sync. Activities become queryable after a short asynchronous ingestion delay. When using `asc` with `after_id` for incremental sync, late-arriving rows with timestamps behind the cursor will be skipped; consumers that need at-least-once delivery should periodically re-poll an overlap window via `created_at.gte` and deduplicate by `id`. `after_id` and `before_id` are relative to this order.
"asc"
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.order%5B0%5D)
"desc"
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.order%5B1%5D)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.order)
organization_ids: optional array of string
Filter activities by organization IDs (accepts `org_...` or organization UUID). Enumerate IDs via `GET /v1/compliance/organizations`.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.organization_ids)
user_ids: optional array of string
Alias for `actor_ids[]`, for consistency with other compliance routes. If both are provided, the lists are merged.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.user_ids)
##### Header ParametersExpand Collapse 
"x-api-key": optional string
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#list.x-api-key)
data: optional array of object { actor, decision, id, 5 more }  or object { actor, id, created_at, 3 more }  or object { actor, admin_api_key_id, scopes, 5 more }  or 326 more
List of activity records. Each element's `type` field identifies which activity it is and which additional fields are present.
AbuseDecisionReceived object { actor, decision, id, 5 more } 
An external anti-abuse service reported a consequential decision about a sign-in or sign-up attempt.
actor: object { api_key_id, ip_address, user_agent, type }  or object { email_address, ip_address, user_agent, 2 more }  or object { ip_address, user_agent, type, unauthenticated_email_address }  or 5 more
A federated external workload authenticated via a verified OIDC token.
Carries the verified issuer, subject, and audience claims from the presented JWT.
APIActor object { api_key_id, ip_address, user_agent, type } 
api_key_id: string
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B0%5D.actor%5B0%5D.api_key_id)

[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B0%5D.actor%5B0%5D.ip_address)
user_agent: string

type: optional "api_actor"
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B0%5D.actor%5B0%5D.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B0%5D.actor%5B0%5D)

claude_project_id: string
Tagged ID of the project the sync source was connected to.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B46%5D.claude_project_id)
claude_project_sync_source_id: string
Tagged ID of the per-project sync source that was created.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B46%5D.claude_project_sync_source_id)
provider: string
The external provider backing the sync source, e.g. `github`, `google_drive`, `outline`, `slack`, `salesforce`, `google_calendar`, `gmail`, `asana`, or `mcp_resources`.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B46%5D.provider)
id: optional string
Unique identifier for the activity e.g. 'activity_abcd1234'
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B46%5D.id)
created_at: optional string
When this activity occurred.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B46%5D.created_at)
organization_id: optional string
Organization ID this activity is associated with
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B46%5D.organization_id)
organization_uuid: optional string
Organization UUID where the activity occurred. Null when the activity is not tied to an organization (for example, login and logout events or calls to the Compliance API).
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B46%5D.organization_uuid)
resource_descriptor: optional string
A short provider-specific identifier for the external resource that was connected, e.g. `owner/repo` for GitHub or a file ID for Google Drive.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B46%5D.resource_descriptor)

ip_address: optional string
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B48%5D.actor%5B7%5D.ip_address)
type: optional "federated_identity_actor"
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B48%5D.actor%5B7%5D.type)

[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B48%5D.actor%5B7%5D.user_agent)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B48%5D.actor%5B7%5D)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B48%5D.actor)
claude_project_id: string
Tagged ID of the project the sync source belongs to.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B48%5D.claude_project_id)
claude_project_sync_source_id: string
Tagged ID of the per-project sync source that was updated.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B48%5D.claude_project_sync_source_id)
provider: string
The external provider backing the sync source, e.g. `github`, `google_drive`, `outline`, `slack`, `salesforce`, `google_calendar`, `gmail`, `asana`, or `mcp_resources`.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B48%5D.provider)
id: optional string
Unique identifier for the activity e.g. 'activity_abcd1234'
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B48%5D.id)
config_changed: optional boolean
Whether the update changed the stored sync-source configuration, including sync settings such as path filters. False for a re-sync or a metadata-only refresh of the same resource.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B48%5D.config_changed)
created_at: optional string
When this activity occurred.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B48%5D.created_at)
organization_id: optional string
Organization ID this activity is associated with
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B48%5D.organization_id)
organization_uuid: optional string
Organization UUID where the activity occurred. Null when the activity is not tied to an organization (for example, login and logout events or calls to the Compliance API).
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B48%5D.organization_uuid)
resource_descriptor: optional string
A short provider-specific identifier for the external resource after the update, e.g. `owner/repo` for GitHub or a file ID for Google Drive.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B48%5D.resource_descriptor)
type: optional "claude_project_sync_source_updated"
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B48%5D.type)
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B48%5D)

The method the user used to authenticate. May be absent on activities recorded before this field was introduced.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B105%5D.auth_method)
created_at: optional string
When this activity occurred.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B105%5D.created_at)
mfa_method: optional "not_used"
The second authentication factor performed during this login, if any. `null` when the second-factor status is not recorded on this event — for example, when authentication was delegated to an external identity provider and any second factor is not visible to Anthropic, or when this event is one step of a multi-step login whose MFA is reported on another activity. May be absent on activities recorded before this field was introduced.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B105%5D.mfa_method)

The OpenTelemetry export endpoint after the change. Credentials in the URL userinfo or query string are removed; path segments are retained. Null if the endpoint is unset or was not itself modified by this update.

otlp_headers_change: optional "cleared" or "set"
Whether the OpenTelemetry export headers were set or cleared. 'set' is recorded for any non-empty submission, including resubmission of an unchanged value. Header values are never included.

updates: array of object { current_value, previous_value, type } 
current_value: string
Setting value immediately after this change. For allowed_inference_geos: a comma-separated list of geo codes (e.g. 'global,us'), or the literal 'unrestricted'. For default_inference_geo: a single geo code.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B138%5D.updates.items.current_value)
previous_value: string
Setting value immediately before this change. For allowed_inference_geos: a comma-separated list of geo codes (e.g. 'global,us'), or the literal 'unrestricted'. For default_inference_geo: a single geo code.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B138%5D.updates.items.previous_value)

RbacRolePermissionAdded object { action, actor, resource_id, 7 more } 

The method the user used to authenticate. May be absent on activities recorded before this field was introduced.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B283%5D.auth_method)
created_at: optional string
When this activity occurred.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B283%5D.created_at)
mfa_method: optional "not_used"
The second authentication factor performed during this login, if any. `null` when the second-factor status is not recorded on this event — for example, when authentication was delegated to an external identity provider and any second factor is not visible to Anthropic, or when this event is one step of a multi-step login whose MFA is reported on another activity. May be absent on activities recorded before this field was introduced.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B283%5D.mfa_method)

mfa_method: optional "not_used"
The second authentication factor performed during this login, if any. `null` when the second-factor status is not recorded on this event — for example, when authentication was delegated to an external identity provider and any second factor is not visible to Anthropic, or when this event is one step of a multi-step login whose MFA is reported on another activity. May be absent on activities recorded before this field was introduced.
[](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/api/compliance/activities/list#activity_list_response%5B305%5D.mfa_method)

TunnelTokenRotated object { actor, tunnel_id, tunnel_token_id, 6 more } 
The Cloudflare connector secret for a tunnel was rotated.
`tunnel_token_id` is the id of the _newly-issued_ token. The previous token is invalidated by the rotation and its id is not recorded here.
actor: object { api_key_id, ip_address, user_agent, type }  or object { email_address, ip_address, user_agent, 2 more }  or object { ip_address, user_agent, type, unauthenticated_email_address }  or 5 more
A federated external workload authenticated via a verified OIDC token.
Carries the verified issuer, subject, and audience claims from the presented JWT.
